CommunityApplications.Profile:
ImgVault is a self-hosted photo and video vault that runs everything in a single Docker container — FastAPI backend, SQLite database, Nginx, and React frontend. No external database, Redis, or sidecar containers needed.
Features: - Automatic library indexing with EXIF metadata extraction - WebP thumbnail generation and video frame thumbnails - Reverse geocoding for GPS-tagged photos with map view - Duplicate and similar-photo detection (pHash) - Virtual albums without moving files - Trash with 30-day auto-purge - Smart cleanup tools for duplicates, short/large videos, and similar photos - Timeline and search - Installable PWA on mobile and desktop
All metadata, thumbnails, and converted media are stored locally on your Unraid array.
